div.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 10px 15px; color: #1a1a1a; font-size: 11px;
text-align: center; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;

h1.t-attf-style: margin: 0 0 3px 0; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: {{primary_color}}; text-transform: uppercase;

div.style: display: inline-block; text-align: left; font-size: 10px; color: #666;
margin-bottom: 12px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 6px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.2px;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -5px;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Full Name

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Date of Birth

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Phone Number

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Email

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
margin-bottom: 12px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 6px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.2px;

div.style: margin-bottom: 8px;

div.t-attf-style: font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin-bottom: 5px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -4px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Sphere

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Cylinder

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Axis

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Add

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
margin-bottom: 8px;

div.t-attf-style: font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin-bottom: 5px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -4px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Sphere

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Cylinder

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Axis

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
flex: 0 0 25%; max-width: 25%; padding: 0 4px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Add

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 28px;
margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -5px;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: PD (Pupillary Distance)

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Expiration Date

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.style: border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px; font-size: 10px; color: #555; white-space: pre-wrap; background-color: #fafafa; min-height: 30px; line-height: 1.4;
margin-bottom: 12px;

h2.t-attf-style: font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: {{primary_color}}; margin: 0 0 6px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.2px;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 0 -5px;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Doctor Name

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: License Number

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Clinic Name

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
flex: 0 0 50%; max-width: 50%; padding: 0 5px; margin-bottom: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;

label.style: display: block; font-size: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #999; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px;

div.label: Phone Number

div.style: border: 1px solid #d0d0d0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px 7px; font-size: 11px; color: #333; background-color: #fafafa;
margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; text-align: center;
div.p: This prescription is valid for 2 years from the date of issue.
For questions or concerns, please contact your optometrist.
